title: Falcon - Pair Headset with Charge Stand
feature: Falcon - Pair Headset with Charge Stand
scenario: Verify that an unpaired headset can be paired via the charge stand, and that the stand info persists in Device Settings > Software Update after removal, restart, and app restart.
steps: 1. Ensure the headset is not previously paired with the charge stand.
2. Place the headset on the charge stand to initiate pairing.
3. Verify that the charge stand info appears in Device Settings > Software Update.
4. Remove the headset from the charge stand.
7. Check that the charge stand info still persists in Device Settings > Software Update.
expected: The headset pairs with the charge stand when placed on it. The charge stand info appears in Device Settings > Software Update and persists after removing the headset, restarting the device, and restarting the app.
